summary: First-finish smoke test for GlobiSync marketing site. Backend contact + bookings endpoints work (POST/GET, 422 on missing fields). Frontend loads on all 7 routes, hero contains 'ambitious brands', WhatsApp FAB has correct wa.me/447309721673 href on every page, Team page shows 3 correct LinkedIn URLs. Booking form (Radix Select for time slot) and Contact form both submit successfully and render their success testids. Mobile nav toggle opens/closes and reveals mobile-nav-home. No console errors.
passed: POST /api/contact -> 200 with round-trip name/email/message; GET /api/contact returns record
POST /api/bookings -> 200 with preferred_date/preferred_time; GET /api/bookings returns record
Home page loads, hero heading contains 'ambitious brands', 'Book a Strategy Call' CTA present
All nav routes /services, /markets, /case-studies, /about, /team, /contact load with unique H1 and no console errors
Contact page: 'Book a strategy call' tab is default; booking form submitted with tomorrow date + Radix Select time slot -> booking-success shows 'Booked.'
Contact page: 'Send a message' tab submission -> contact-success visible
WhatsAppFAB [data-testid=whatsapp-fab] visible on home/contact with href containing wa.me/447309721673
Mobile viewport (390x844): nav-mobile-toggle opens/closes; mobile-nav-home visible only when open
Team page has 3 LinkedIn links: shwetachauhanuk, sunnychauhanuk, zainalvi
notes: RESEND_API_KEY intentionally empty; email_configured=false as expected — not a bug. Booking time is a Radix Select (not native <select>) — tests must click the trigger then click [role=option]. Mobile menu links use mobile-nav-* testids (not nav-*).
